channel.title: BUpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In battleground Michigan, 3 Democrats test vision of affordability in the Senate primary
item.description: When Donald Trump fought his way back to the White House in 2024, he capitalized on simmering economic discontent in political battlegrounds such as M...

item.title: Feds open a perjury probe into ICE officers' testimony about the shooting of a Venezuelan man
item.description: Federal authorities have opened a criminal probe into whether two immigration officers lied under oath about a shooting in Minneapolis last month, as ...

item.title: How Jeffrey Epstein used the glamour of the Nobel Peace Prize to entice his global network of elites
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein repeatedly played up his ties to the former head of the Nobel Peace Prize committee in invitations to and chats with elites like Richa...

item.title: Minnesota shooting of Venezuelan man is the latest where video evidence contradicts ICE accounts
item.description: Federal authorities announced an investigation Friday into two immigration officers who appeared to have made untruthful statements under oath about a...

item.title: Judge rules ICE can't make warrantless arrests at some churches
item.description: A federal judge said Friday that ICE's policy of allowing arrests at churches tramples on religious rights, and he issued an order blocking arrests un...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trumpâs economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: CNN Wonders Why ICE Is Targeting Charlotte, N.C. Hereâs Why.

item.title: Deterring Illegal Immigration: This Town Decided that Actions Speak Louder than Words
item.description: After approving an anti-sanctuary resolution, Worthington Hills, Kentucky is not a sanctuary for illegal aliens. To read the rest of the article click...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called âamazing and impressiveâ despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with âThe Emperor of All Maladiesâ author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
